input_snapshot.algorithm: sha256 over sorted per-file sha256 digests (excluding .DS_Store)

observations_not_resolved: File knowledge/Docs/API-002.md.txt carries internal header 'TASKPRO-API-001', colliding with API-001.md.txt's family ID; registered by filename-derived ID.
Conversational preambles in .md.txt files treated as non-canonical noise; extraction anchored on artifact headers only.

assertions.Expedition: .synth/expeditions.json (10 registered expeditions, 0 started, 1 gated on R1)
assertions.State: .synth/state.json (phase, confidence map, 3 open decisions, 4 reconciliations, invariants)

rejected_actions.action: Fix stray character at knowledge/Docs/DS-05.md line 1
rejected_actions.reason: Mutation of authored knowledge; tracked as R2, requires approval-gated edit.
Unnecessary (header-anchored registration resolves addressing); rename is approval-gated, R4.

rejected_actions.action: Edit DEV-001 to remove superseded React Navigation recommendation
rejected_actions.reason: Authored knowledge mutation; supersession edge recorded instead, R3.
Knowledge creation; conflict tracked as R1, gates E7, requires human ratification.

rejected_actions.action: Select i18n library / payment gateway sequencing / test tool versions
rejected_actions.reason: Insufficient evidence; recorded as open decisions D1-D3 with derivation_type UNRESOLVED.

rejected_actions.action: Generate package.json, CI workflows, Expo config, or any scaffold
rejected_actions.reason: Implementation output; belongs to expeditions (E1+), forbidden to initialization (constraint 3).

rejected_actions.action: Copy or normalize knowledge artifacts into .synth/
rejected_actions.reason: Evidence registrations are pointers and claims, never copies; two authorities must not exist.
Not approved; git mutations require explicit per-action approval.

invariants_verified: Atomicity: all assertions committed together; on any failure .synth/ and AGENTS.md are removed entirely.
Provenance totality: every assertion carries evidence_sources; empty evidence only with derivation_type UNRESOLVED.
Capability isolation: no codegen, scaffold, install, migrate, or compile invoked during initialization.
Determinism: replaying extraction over the same input_snapshot hash reproduces identical governance state.
